name: Nespresso — Bait and hook (machines + capsules)
description: The modern bait-and-hook descendant of Gillette. Two BMCs — machines as bait (low or zero margin, sold to lock customers into the Nespresso ecosystem) and capsules as hook (high recurring margin, only Nespresso-compatible) — that together show how the 1901 urtype scales into a luxury-brand premium-consumer product, and how patent expiry pressure pushed Nestlé to extend the model with the Vertuo line.
